Now I have a clear picture of the bug. Let me create a todo list and begin working on the fix.

The bug is on line 150 of `KinesisService.java`:

```java
if (retentionPeriodHours <= stream.getRetentionPeriodHours()) {
```

This rejects any value that's less than or **equal to** the current retention period. But real AWS treats "equal to" as a no-op (returns success). The fix is to change `<=` to `<` so only truly lower values are rejected.

Let me first write a test to reproduce the bug, then fix
